id: post-v-1-companies-company-id-pay-schedules-assignment-preview

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Preview pay schedule assignments for a company"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/pay_schedules/assignment_preview"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint returns the employee changes, including pay period and transition pay periods, for changing the pay schedule.

scope: `pay_schedules:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
